latest_articles.title: Pope Leo visits Algeria in sign of Africa’s growing importance to Catholic church
latest_articles.summary: Pontiff makes first papal visit to country as he starts 11-day tour that will also include stops in Cameroon and AngolaPope Leo XIV has arrived in Algeria for the first papal visit to the country, calling for peace on th…

latest_articles.title: Pope Leo to visit four African countries in April
latest_articles.summary: This is the first time that a pope will visit Algeria, whose population is mostly Muslim.
